chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3493 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.14712/2025 2. For hearing of main case 10.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Haleem Jamali, advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners Mr. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali, advocate for the respondents No.8 & 10 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG Mr. Siraj Ali Khan Chandio, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh I.O/SIP Manzoor of PS Garden, Karachi --------- In essence, this is a case of free-will marriage; however, FIR No.199 of 2025 has been lodged against the husband of petitioner No.1 Mst. Zainab Shabbir at Police Station Sujawal under Sections 324, 506/2, 427, 114, 504, 34 PPC. I.O/SIP Manzoor of PS Garden, is present in Court and states that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Zainab Shabbir and on the basis of this statement and any other inquiry which is made in respect of FIR No.199 of 2025 under Sections 324, 506/2, 427, 114, 504, 34 PPC registered at PS Sujawal, the concerned I.O shall lodge his report in the appropriate class based on evidence collected as per statement of lady. However, due protection shall be provided to the petitioners and no harassment shall be caused to the couple. Instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
